name: Med Spa & Aesthetics
tagline: The med spa growth shows — and they cross-sell straight into loyalty.
display_description: The aesthetics-business shows med spa owners follow for marketing, retention, and front-desk conversion. PA listens to every new episode and files the tactics in your brain — the retention plays line up with Buildout Loyalty, so the booking-and-rebooking ideas you hear turn into something you can actually run.

shows.title: Medical Spa Insider
shows.why: The industry association's show — compliance, regulation, and the business of med spas.

shows.title: Med Spa CEO
shows.why: Scaling a med spa — pricing, team, and owner mindset.

shows.title: Spa Marketing Made Easy
shows.why: Marketing and retention systems for spa and aesthetics businesses.

shows.title: Beyond the Needle: The Aesthetics Business Podcast
shows.why: Running and growing an aesthetics practice, front-desk to P&L.

shows.title: Botox and Burpees
shows.why: Aesthetics practice, leadership, and the operator's life behind the clinic.

shows.title: MedShark Insider
shows.why: Digital marketing and lead-gen specifically for med spas.

shows.title: Aesthetically Speaking
shows.why: Plastic surgery and med spa marketing, presented by Nextech.

shows.title: The Aesthetic Edit
shows.why: Social-first marketing and brand for aesthetics clinics.
